channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The bond market is flashing a clear signal on interest rates. Bitcoin bulls should take note
item.description: The bond market is sending a signal that complicates prospects of a near-term bitcoin bull run.

item.title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
item.description: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.

item.title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
item.description: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether ETFs lose $111 million combined as rate-cut hopes die
item.description: Total crypto market value has held steady near $2.26 trillion since Tuesday, with the recovery losing momentum after the Fed killed rate-cut hopes and spot ETFs swung back to outflows.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par
item.description: The slide has paused the above-par share sales Strategy uses to fund bitcoin purchases, and it is the same stock whose dividends forced the company's first BTC sale this month.

item.title: Dorsey’s Block says new AI tool handles 15% of code work
item.description: Builderbot is the “missing layer between AI coding tools and how engineering actually works at scale,” said Brad Axen, head of AI capabilities at Block.

item.title: XRP slips 4% below $1.20 after breakout rally stalls near key resistance
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP back through a closely watched support level, though buyers stepped in above $1.17 to prevent a deeper pullback.

item.title: Buying bitcoin below its 200-week average has historically delivered over 100% in median returns, Kraken says
item.description: Bitcoin briefly slipped below its 200-week moving average twice in the past two weeks, a rare event that Kraken says has historically marked strong entry points for buyers.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether slide after a hawkish Fed, even as Trump's signed Iran deal lifts stocks
item.description: The Fed held rates but signaled it is more worried about inflation than growth in Chair Kevin Warsh's first meeting.

item.title: France to stop certifying products lacking quantum-resistant encryption
item.description: France’s cybersecurity agency plans to block certification of products without quantum-resistant encryption starting in 2027, with full adoption targeted for 2030.

item.title: Next bull run will be slower, less volatile as investors' crypto appetite evolves, Bitwise CIO says
item.description: Long-time bitcoin bull Matt Hougan told CoinDesk that during this bear market and with ‘doubts swirling’, investors have found ‘it easier to reach for something more tangible:’ stablecoins and tokenization.

item.title: CME chief executive says company plans to sue CFTC after perpetual futures approval
item.description: Kalshi's perpetual futures product did not meet the Dodd-Frank Act's definition of a "swap" and should not have been approved, Terrence Duffy said.

item.title: Kentucky sues Kalshi, Polymarket, joining prediction market legal battle
item.description: Kentucky has sued Polymarket, Kalshi and Kalshi’s partners Coinbase, Robinhood and Webull, over offering sports event contracts in the state.

item.title: Tether winds down gold-backed derivative stablecoin aUSDT
item.description: Tether is focusing on stronger user demand, deeper liquidity, and broader long-term market opportunity for its leading products.

item.title: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow
item.description: French authorities said that government cybersecurity researchers will stop certifying security products that lack quantum-resistant encryption beginning in 2027.

item.title: Crypto market treads thin ice following Warsh FOMC, Trump Iran comments
item.description: Markets wobbled after mixed comments from President Trump on the Iran peace deal and Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaling a new direction from the Federal Reserve.

item.title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
item.description: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.

item.title: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
item.description: The judge said Polymarket is not likely to succeed on the merits of its case against Michigan state regulators.

item.title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
item.description: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

item.title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
item.description: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

item.title: Kentucky targets prediction markets, puts red state in potential clash with Trump team
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken the stance that states have no business with firms like Kalshi and Polymarket, and now a staunch GOP state is defying that view.

item.title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
item.description: Several more US states are scheduled to hold primaries next week after one Republican candidate won in Alabama on Tuesday after a crypto company-backed PAC used what it called its “biggest spend of the cycle.”

item.title: Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves
item.description: Following State Street, Fidelity is targeting reserve assets that underpin the expanding stablecoin market.

item.title: Bitcoin capitulation ‘twice as weak’ after spot liquidity turns supportive: Glassnode
item.description: Bitcoin’s realized losses fell by 46% as increasing bid-side liquidity points to easing sell pressure. Can bulls push BTC price back above $70,000?

item.title: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
item.description: Nvidia's ENPIRE hands an entire robot fleet to coding agents like Codex and Claude Code, letting them write training code, test it on real hardware, and improve without a human watching.

item.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
item.description: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

item.title: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
item.description: The rollout in collaboration with Ondo Finance broadens access to tokenized traditional assets as demand for onchain stocks and ETFs continues to grow.

item.title: Here is how Coinbase plan to survive the crypto downturn by ditching its reliance on trading fees
item.description: Analysts say the exchange's push into derivatives, payments and infrastructure broadens its growth story beyond crypto trading.

item.title: Altcoin selling tops $266B as capital rotates out of crypto: Is altseason extinct?
item.description: Altcoin spot demand fell to its weakest level in six years while the stablecoin market cap, stocks and AI industry continued to capture investors’ attention.

item.title: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
item.description: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance said Wednesday that it raised a $32 million Series A round to help expand its reach.

item.title: Bitcoin layer-2s face a bear-market reality check
item.description: Botanix's shutdown has raised an uncomfortable question for Bitcoin builders: Does the market actually want programmable BTC, or just a better way to borrow, lend and earn yield on it?

item.title: FIFA wanted Avalanche's blockchain to help curb World Cup ticket scalping. Here's how it's going
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at how FIFA is using the Avalanche blockchain to test out a new ticketing system.

item.title: Estonia Wants to Give AI Agents Their Own National ID
item.description: Prime Minister Kristen Michal backed a proposal to issue AI agents a personal identification code separate from the people who own them.

item.title: Coinbase-Backed Crypto Perps Exchange Satori Finance Is Shutting Down
item.description: Perps DEX Satori Finance is the latest in a string of crypto firms forced to shut their doors amid an extended market downturn.

item.title: Bitcoin Slides as Fed Says It Will 'Deliver Price Stability' Under Kevin Warsh
item.description: The first FOMC meeting under new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh produced the expected result, yet Bitcoin and other assets dipped.

item.title: Fed holds rates steady in first decision under new Chairman Kevin Warsh
item.description: The accompanying policy statement and updated economic projections, however, took a hawkish turn.

item.title: Kalshi adds software partner as it looks to boost prediction market surveillance
item.description: The collaboration comes as US state regulators and the CFTC battle over oversight of event-based contracts.

item.title: GLAAD Says AI Is Failing LGBTQ Users—And Warns the Risk Is Growing
item.description: GLAAD's report argues AI systems can amplify anti-LGBTQ bias, misinformation, discrimination, and privacy harms.

item.title: US lawmakers warn against presidential pardon for Sam Bankman-Fried
item.description: The former FTX CEO is currently serving a 25-year sentence after being found guilty on seven felony charges related to the misuse of customer funds.

item.title: Illinois Set to Begin Taxing Bitcoin, Crypto Transactions as Critics Slam 'Most Punitive' Tax
item.description: Critics say the Illinois transaction-level tax could deal severe consequences to the crypto industry and consumers in the state.

item.title: What Is Hyperliquid? The Decentralized Exchange With Its Own Blockchain
item.description: Hyperliquid’s decentralized exchange has rapidly grown to become one of the biggest projects in crypto. Here’s how it works.

item.title: Seeing the Full Picture: Why Pre- and Post-Designation Exposure Changes Everything in Sanctions Screening
item.description: Sanctions compliance in crypto isn’t just about knowing who’s on a list today. It’s about understanding the full arc of… The post Seeing the Full Picture: Why Pre- and Post-Designation Exposure Changes Everything in Sanctions Screening app…

item.title: Crypto industry aghast at Illinois' new tax on holding or transferring digital assets in state budget
item.description: The 0.2% tax on any business activity involving digital assets was added last-minute, and is unlikely to change, two people familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: The measure of a maturing market
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, trusted indexes turn fragmented digital assets into a mature market that big institutions can confidently invest in, writes Kirsten Wegner. Then, the division between traditional finance (TradFi) and cry…

item.title: Allbirds Stock Pumps Again as Sneaker Firm Completes AI Pivot, Rebranding to Smartbird
item.description: Allbirds, meet Smartbird: The shoe brand has completed its AI pivot, rebranding while hiring a new president and CEO to lead the charge.

item.title: Moody’s rolls out credit ratings on Solana in tokenized asset push
item.description: The ratings giant is embedding credit scores directly into blockchain-based securities, a move aimed at boosting institutional adoption.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇲🇽 Mexican billionaire Ricardo Salinas says Bitcoin is a better investment than real estate, predicting it will eventually reach $1,000,000 👀 He holds 70% of his estimated $5 billion net worth in BTC 🤯 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1QNmJkS3NHNEpDVE54NGc4MUMyOW50eGc5b2ppTDdqVHZFSDRhWmNoREpNR0pocmYyczFDbWZ4ZktzY0NpdVRFYzgwanFzRzY2OU8wdVVuSi1qNmVRZGhVN3pBbUhLX2s?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇲🇽 Mexican billi…

item.title: Florida Man 'Bitcoin Rodney' Pleads Guilty Over $1.8 Billion HyperFund Crypto Fraud
item.description: A Miami-based man who went by the name “Bitcoin Rodney” pleaded guilty for his role in what prosecutors said was a massive global fraud.

item.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
item.description: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.

item.title: BitGo stock surges on $50 million share buyback as value languishes 65% below IPO price
item.description: The buyback comes as newly public digital-asset firms face a tougher environment, with crypto markets lagging and investor attention shifting toward AI stocks.

item.title: Bitcoin price sets $64.5K week-to-date low as Strategy selling worries return
item.description: Bitcoin circled $65,000 after downside BTC price pressure into the FOMC meeting as analysis warned over the impact of Strategy potentially selling more BTC in the future.

item.title: 'Rapidly Evolving': Benchmark Analyst Bullish on Coinbase After Stocks, Options Moves
item.description: Benchmark-StoneX reiterated a $270 price target for COIN—60% higher than Coinbase’s current share price—following an array of product announcements.

item.title: pretty significant spot here for bitcoin, retesting key weekly resistance level from this range around 65-66k, not looking for longs here as i think there are better things to long, but if it does close above likely retests 72k (im in this camp) if wrong & we see weakne - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBtN1ZncFBTMUl5R0tUTi1IYUtWRnBwRkxhVlU0Mm8ydnFtS1h1U0RTRWU4bTZDOFRiUGdPWlNTU3NfaC1GSzNTSkhydDZsVndjNHN3dTNzZHI0eGJQNHpZ?oc=5" target="_blank">pretty significant spot here for bitco…

item.title: Crypto’s security nightmare won’t be solved by ordinary audits
item.description: Without an update to the current auditing infrastructure, the crypto space will likely continue to suffer significant losses, explains Beyer.

item.title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
item.description: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

item.title: Mexican billionaire with 70% of his investment portfolio in bitcoin says it's better than real estate
item.description: Ricardo Salinas Pliego, whose net worth is estimated at roughly $5 billion, is a bitcoin maximalist who told his wife to mortgage her house to buy bitcoin.

item.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
item.description: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

item.title: The hardest thing in business is not seeing the future. It is surviving long enough to build it. My fireside chat with @Julian_Liniger at @BTCPrague on focus, endurance, corporate transformation, and how entrepreneurs can use Bitcoin, AI, and digital finance to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBRLTBDakFwVEQwYjJCNWRwMF96NU9XMDl0NE4yRnhLaWVVQVFDMmxzeVVQSllDaExCclM1SnpwUFF6MnRSSFRmQm9GdklvWWJZQnpRUF9wSl9Udjg?oc=5" target="_blank">The hardest thing in business is not seeing…

item.title: Senators Introduce Bipartisan Resolution Opposing SBF Pardon
item.description: Senators Gallego and Lummis want the chamber on record that the FTX fraudster should get no clemency under any circumstances.
